bank: Headline with stronger emotional words gets more clicks
Headline that is clearer and simpler gets more clicks
Headline implying new or unique info gets more clicks
Headline with specific details or numbers gets more clicks
Headline conveying urgency or timeliness gets more clicks
Headline suggesting personal relevance gets more clicks
Headline posing a question or curiosity gap gets more clicks
Headline of moderate length (10-15 words) gets more clicks
Headline containing power words gets more clicks
Headline avoiding misleading clickbait gets more clicks
Headline with negative framing gets more clicks when news is serious
Headline with positive framing gets more clicks when news is uplifting
Headline including numbers or list indicators gets more clicks
Headline mentioning known names or entities gets more clicks
Headline in active voice gets more clicks
